oracleCard.name: Meekstone
oracleCard.text: Creatures with power 3 or greater don't untap during their controllers' untap steps.

card.flavor: "I wrecked your metal guy, boss. But look! I made you an ashtray."

oracleCard.name: Goblin Welder
oracleCard.text: {T}: Choose target artifact a player controls and target artifact card in that player's graveyard. If both targets are still legal as this ability resolves, that player simultaneously sacrifices the artifact and returns the artifact card to the battlefield.

oracleCard.name: Goblin Engineer
oracleCard.text:
When this creature enters, you may search your library for an artifact card, put it into your graveyard, then shuffle.
{R}, {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Return target artifact card with mana value 3 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.flavor: "Not so scary when you can't squeeze through the air ducts, are you?"

oracleCard.name: Crawlspace
oracleCard.text: No more than two creatures can attack you each combat.

card.flavor:
"As long as we have the will to fight, we are never without weapons."
—Koth of the Hammer

oracleCard.name: Slagstorm
oracleCard.text:
Choose one —
• Slagstorm deals 3 damage to each creature.
• Slagstorm deals 3 damage to each player.

oracleCard.name: Flameshadow Conjuring
oracleCard.text: Whenever a nontoken creature you control enters, you may pay {R}. If you do, create a token that's a copy of that creature. That token gains haste. Exile it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.flavor: A passionate recruiter will win a war before the first arrow flies.

oracleCard.name: Imperial Recruiter
oracleCard.text: When this creature enters, search your library for a creature card with power 2 or less, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.flavor: When you've got nothing, you might as well trade it for something else.

oracleCard.name: Gamble
oracleCard.text: Search your library for a card, put that card into your hand, discard a card at random, then shuffle.

card.flavor: Not all Keld's warriors are found on the battlefield.

oracleCard.name: Repercussion
oracleCard.text: Whenever a creature is dealt damage, this enchantment deals that much damage to that creature's controller.

card.flavor: Supplicants offer flesh and silver, flowers and blood. The altar takes what it will, eyes gleaming with unspoken promises.

oracleCard.name: Altar of the Brood
oracleCard.text: Whenever another permanent you control enters, each opponent mills a card.

card.flavor: All goblin rituals serve a dual purpose as fertility rites, even the destructive ones. Especially the destructive ones.

oracleCard.name: Kuldotha Rebirth
oracleCard.text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice an artifact.
Create three 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens.

oracleCard.name: War Elemental
oracleCard.text:
When this creature enters, sacrifice it unless an opponent was dealt damage this turn.
Whenever an opponent is dealt damage, put that many +1/+1 counters on this creature.

card.flavor: "Listen to the roar! Feel the thunder! The Immersturm shouts its approval with every bolt of lightning!"

oracleCard.name: Warstorm Surge
oracleCard.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, it deals damage equal to its power to any target.

card.flavor: "Why don't you come a little closer and say that again, you spineless spit-licker!"

oracleCard.name: Brash Taunter
oracleCard.text:
Indestructible
Whenever this creature is dealt damage, it deals that much damage to target opponent.
{2}{R}, {T}: This creature fights another target creature.

oracleCard.name: Currency Converter
oracleCard.text:
Whenever you discard a card, you may exile that card from your graveyard.
{2}, {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card.
{T}: Put a card exiled with this artifact into its owner's graveyard. If it's a land card, create a Treasure token. If it's a nonland card, create a 2/2 black Rogue creature token.

faces.name: Virtue of Courage
faces.text: Whenever a source you control deals noncombat damage to an opponent, you may exile that many cards from the top of your library. You may play those cards this turn.

faces.name: Embereth Blaze
faces.text: Embereth Blaze deals 2 damage to any target. (Then exile this card. You may cast the enchantment later from exile.)

oracleCard.name: Cursed Mirror
oracleCard.text:
{T}: Add {R}.
As this artifact enters, you may have it become a copy of any creature on the battlefield until end of turn, except it has haste.

oracleCard.name: Professional Face-Breaker
oracleCard.text:
Menace
Whenever one or more creatures you control deal combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token.
Sacrifice a Treasure: Exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.

card.flavor:
"Lock the door and eat the key."
—Vraan, Executioner Thane

oracleCard.name: Soulless Jailer
oracleCard.text:
Permanent cards in graveyards can't enter the battlefield.
Players can't cast noncreature spells from graveyards or exile.

card.flavor: Most clocks measure time, but a few measure everything.

oracleCard.name: Clock of Omens
oracleCard.text: Tap two untapped artifacts you control: Untap target artifact.

oracleCard.name: Arena of Glory
oracleCard.text:
This land enters tapped unless you control a Mountain.
{T}: Add {R}.
{R}, {T}, Exert this land: Add {R}{R}. If that mana is spent on a creature spell, it gains haste until end of turn. (An exerted permanent won't untap during your next untap step.)

oracleCard.name: Uncivil Unrest
oracleCard.text:
Nontoken creatures you control have riot. (They enter with your choice of a +1/+1 counter or haste.)
If a creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it would deal damage to a permanent or player, it deals double that damage instead.

card.flavor: "I have a bad feeling about this."

oracleCard.name: Norin the Wary
oracleCard.text: When a player casts a spell or a creature attacks, exile Norin. Return it to the battlefield under its owner's control at the beginning of the next end step.

card.flavor: "The Burn"—once a verdant region teeming with flora and fauna, repeated summonings saw it bled of aether and reduced to a barren desert.

oracleCard.name: Scavenger Grounds
oracleCard.text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice a Desert: Exile all graveyards.

edition.editionname: The Lord of the Rings: Tales of Middle-earth

oracleCard.name: Mount Doom
oracleCard.text:
{T}, Pay 1 life: Add {B} or {R}.
{1}{B}{R}, {T}: Mount Doom deals 1 damage to each opponent.
{5}{B}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice Mount Doom and a legendary artifact: Choose up to two creatures, then destroy the rest. Activate only as a sorcery.
